title: Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 预览版发布，Token Plan 订阅方案升级
title_zh: Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 预览版发布，Token Plan 订阅方案升级
source_name: Hacker News 热门（buzzing.cc 中文翻译）
full_text:
Token Plan Upgraded
Individual is now available, and Team is more affordable. Get advanced models like Qwen3.8-Max-Preview for less—and start building with AI today. Token Plan
Multiple Models, One Plan
One plan offers unified access to leading text, vision, speech, and image generation models.
Seamless AI Toolchain Integration
Higher Quota, Better Price
glm-5.2
deepseek-v4-pro
wan2.7-image-pro
01 Install Qwen Code... Success.
02 Open Qwen Code and go to Settings.
03 Find the provider section and
04 choose Qwen Cloud Coding Plan.
05 Sign in with your Qwen Cloud account
06 and confirm.
07 Save settings and start coding with Qwen Cloud in Qwen Code .

Frequently Asked Questions
How do I use the Token Plan Individual?
After subscribing to Token Plan Individual, follow these steps:
• Subscribe: Buy Token Plan on this page.
• Get your credentials: Go to the 「API Keys」page to get your base URL and API key.
• Configure and use: Enter the base URL and API key in any supported AI tool to complete setup. (Note: For tool-specific setup instructions, see the integration guide .)
Can I subscribe to multiple Token Plan Individual plans at once?
Does Token Plan Individual support refunds?
How do I check my Token Plan usage?

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 通义千问发布 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 预览版，并推出升级版 Token Plan 订阅方案。新方案提供 Individual 和 Team 两种计划，支持统一访问文本、视觉、语音和图像生成模型。Lite、Standard、Pro 三档月费计划分别支持 1-2、3-4、6-8 个并发智能体。
